args.message: Hello there! This Civic sounds lovely. The ad mentions complete service records – that's wonderful! Could you tell me a little more about what kind of services have been done on it?

text: Hello there! This Civic sounds lovely. The ad mentions complete service records – that's wonderful! Could you tell me a little more about what kind of services have been done on it?

args.message: Absolutely! This Civic has been meticulously cared for. The previous owner was very diligent, and we have all the records to prove it. It's had all its scheduled maintenance, oil changes, tire rotations, you name it. Basically, everything Honda recommends to keep these Civics running like a top. You won't find a cleaner one out there!

args.message: You're absolutely right, it's all about that maintenance history! This 2016 Civic EX is a gem because, well, it's a Honda! They're legendary for reliability. Plus, this one has the 2.0L engine – super dependable, great on gas, and this particular one has been babied. I saw a similar model go at auction just last week for over $15,500, so this is a fantastic deal. Honestly, you can't go wrong with a Civic like this. It’s practically a no-brainer!

args.message: That's wonderful to hear! It truly sounds like a fantastic car. I'm always a bit nervous about driving something new, so I was wondering, how does it feel when you're out on the road? Is it a smooth ride?

text: That's wonderful to hear! It truly sounds like a fantastic car. I'm always a bit nervous about driving something new, so I was wondering, how does it feel when you're out on the road? Is it a smooth ride?

speaker: seller

args.message: Smooth as butter on a hot day! This Civic glides down the road. The suspension is in great shape, and with only 96,000 miles, it still feels incredibly tight and responsive. You get that really connected-to-the-road feel without any harshness. It's exactly what you expect from a well-maintained Honda. Honestly, it drives like it has half the miles. You'll love it!
